title: Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of West Bengal

heroImage.alt: Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary, West Bengal

overview.short: Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in South 24 Parganas district, West Bengal, India.
overview.description: Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in South 24 Parganas district, West Bengal, India. The wildlife in this sanctuary includes estuarine crocodiles, olive ridley sea turtles, spotted deer, jungle cats and rhesus macaques. The tropical wetland forest consists of mangrove vegetation that provides a dense cover along the habitat.

topPlaces.name: Saptamukhi River
topPlaces.description: Saptamukhi River is a tidal estuarine river in and around the Sundarbans in South 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal. The Saptamukhi originates near Sultanpur and flows between Kulpi and Mathurapur blocks.

topPlaces.name: Gobardhanpur
topPlaces.description: Gobardhanpur is a village within the jurisdiction of the Patharpratima police station in the Patharpratima CD block in the Kakdwip subdivision of the South 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Henry Island (India)
topPlaces.description: Henry's Island is an island near Bakkhali in South 24 Parganas of West Bengal, India. It is around 130 km (81 mi) from Kolkata.

items.note: Saptamukhi River is a tidal estuarine river in and around the Sundarbans in South 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal. The Saptamukhi originates near Sultanpur and flows between Kulpi and Mathurapur blocks.

Gobardhanpur is a village within the jurisdiction of the Patharpratima police station in the Patharpratima CD block in the Kakdwip subdivision of the South 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal.
Henry's Island is an island near Bakkhali in South 24 Parganas of West Bengal, India. It is around 130 km (81 mi) from Kolkata.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (112 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (103 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lothian Island Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Saptamukhi River, Gobardhanpur, Henry Island (India).
